summary: AAV (Agent Authority Vault) Integration testing completed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All AAV controls verified in policy wizard Step 3. Fixed bug where approved/pending spend requests were not storing AAV fields.

tests: AAV toggle visible in Step 3 - PASS
AAV section header 'Agent Authorization (AAV Integration)' visible - PASS
Authorized Agent IDs input visible when AAV enabled - PASS
AAV Grant IDs input visible when AAV enabled - PASS
Enforcement mode select visible when AAV enabled - PASS
AAV section visible in Step 4 Review with badges and values - PASS

escrow_accounts_aav_fields.aav_enabled: Boolean field returned in API response

spend_requests_aav.aav_agent_id: Captured from X-AAV-Agent-Id header or body
spend_requests_aav.aav_grant_id: Captured from X-AAV-Grant-Id header or body

rules_engine_aav_step.step_2_5: AAV Authorization check after escrow validation

frontend_wizard_step_3.agent_ids_input: Comma-separated list of authorized agent IDs
frontend_wizard_step_3.grant_ids_input: Comma-separated list of AAV grant IDs
frontend_wizard_step_3.review_display: Shows AAV Enabled badge, Mode badge, Agents list, Grants list

bug_fixed.description: Approved and pending spend requests were not storing AAV fields (aav_agent_id, aav_grant_id, aav_verification_status)
bug_fixed.fix: Added AAV fields to spendRequest.create() for both approved and pending_approval cases

critical_code_review_comments: AAV verification is MOCKED - verifyAAVToken and verifyAAVSignature accept any signature >10 chars. Full JWT verification needed when AAV service is available.
Schema correctly includes AAV fields on EscrowAccount, SpendingPolicy, SpendRequest, and AAVConfiguration models
Rules engine correctly implements Step 2.5 AAV Authorization after escrow validation
Frontend wizard Step 3 correctly shows AAV section with toggle, agent IDs, grant IDs, and enforcement mode
seed_data_creation: Used existing AAV-enabled escrow esc_q8ymftnecfcp with agents: agent_marketing_bot, agent_test
context_for_next_testing_agent: AAV integration fully tested. Backend APIs return AAV fields on escrow, policy, and spend endpoints. Rules engine includes aav_authorization step. Frontend wizard Step 3 shows AAV controls. AAV verification is MOCKED (accepts any signature >10 chars). Escrow esc_q8ymftnecfcp has AAV enabled with strict mode.

mocked_apis.verifyAAVToken: Accepts any JWT format, decodes without cryptographic verification
